scripts.clean: rm -rf apps/api/dist apps/api/coverage packages/shared/dist apps/mobile/.expo apps/mobile/dist apps/mobile/web-build
scripts.build: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter api build
scripts.api: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter api dev
scripts.mobile: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter mobile start
